revision.text:
[[ja:舞台1号墳]] {{Infobox ancient site|type = {{ill|scallop-shaped kofun|ja|帆立貝形古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/scallop-shaped kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} | name = Butai No. 1 Kofun | image = | Other name = | part_of = | location = {{ill|Maebashi|en|Maebashi|qid=Q201613|lt=Maebashi|1=Maebashi}}, Arakoma, Butai, {{ill|Gunma Prefecture|en|Gunma Prefecture|qid=Q129499|lt=Gunma Prefecture|1=Gunma Prefecture}} | coordinates = {{Coord|36|22|43.17|N|139|10|32.62|E||qq=}} | type = {{ill|Scallop-shaped Kofun|ja|帆立貝形古墳|1=scallop-shaped kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Scallop-shaped Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/scallop-shaped kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} | area = Mound length: 42 m | burial = Unknown | burial goods = Stone products, iron products, {{ill|Haniwa|en|Haniwa|qid=Q849376|lt=haniwa|1=Haniwa}}, {{ill|Haji pottery|en|Haji pottery|qid=Q5639938|lt=Haji pottery|1=Haji pottery}} | Kofuns = | built = Mid-to-late {{ill|5th century|en|5th century|qid=Q8095|lt=5th century|1=5th century}} | Interred_individual = | Mausoleum = | alternate_name = None | designation1 = burial goods Historic Site1 as {{ill|Important Cultural Property (Japan)|en|Important Cultural Property (Japan)|qid=Q1188622|lt=Important Cultural Property|1=Important Cultural Property (Japan)}} | notes = Mound no longer exists | map = {{location map|Japan Gunma|map_dot_label=Butai No. 1 Kofun|coordinates=36|coordinates=22|coordinates=43.17|lon_deg=139|lon_min=10|lon_sec=32.62|mark=Scallop-shaped Kofun-SW.svg|marksize=28|float=center|border=none|position=bottom|width=200|caption=|qq=}} }} '''Butai No. 1 Kofun''' (舞台1号墳) is a {{ill|Kofun|en|Kofun|qid=Q1141225|lt=Kofun|1=Kofun}} located in Arako-machi, Butai, {{ill|Maebashi|en|Maebashi|qid=Q201613|lt=Maebashi|1=Maebashi}}, {{ill|Gunma Prefecture|en|Gunma Prefecture|qid=Q129499|lt=Gunma Prefecture|1=Gunma Prefecture}}. The Kofun is a {{ill|scallop-shaped|ja|帆立貝形古墳|1=scallop-shaped kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/scallop-shaped|13=User:Immanuelle/scallop-shaped kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}, and burial goods recovered from it have been Historic Site1 as {{ill|Important Cultural Property (Japan)|en|Important Cultural Property (Japan)|qid=Q1188622|lt=Important Cultural Property|1=Important Cultural Property (Japan)}}. The mound itself no longer exists. == Overview == The kofun was built on a plateau on the southern slopes of {{ill|Mount Akagi|en|Mount Akagi|qid=Q415251|lt=Mount Akagi|1=Mount Akagi}}, along the right bank of the Kanzawa River. As of the time of excavation, the top of the mound had been leveled, and a full archaeological investigation was conducted in {{ill|1990|en|1990|qid=Q2064|lt=1990|1=1990}} (Heisei 2). The Kofun is a {{ill|scallop-shaped Kofun|ja|帆立貝形古墳|1=scallop-shaped kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/scallop-shaped Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/scallop-shaped kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} with a short front section (rectangular protrusion) facing southwest. The surface of the mound was found to have {{ill|Fukiishi|en|Fukiishi|qid=Q11621213|lt=fukiishi|1=Fukiishi}}, a row of {{ill|cylindrical haniwa|ja|円筒埴輪|1=Cylindrical Haniwa|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/cylindrical haniwa|13=User:Immanuelle/Cylindrical Haniwa|qq=}} (including "morning glory"-shaped haniwa), and various {{ill|figurative haniwa|ja|形象埴輪|1=Representational Haniwa|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/figurative haniwa|13=User:Immanuelle/Representational Haniwa|qq=}} such as chicken-shaped, house-shaped, shield-shaped, lid-shaped, human-arm-shaped, and horse-saddle-shaped haniwa. A pit (1.4 × 0.65 meters) was identified in the front section, containing numerous stone products (magatama, cylindrical beads, arrowheads, clogs, sickles, small axes, and knife-shaped objects), as well as a few iron products (knives, sickles, chisels). Haji pottery, such as ritual offering dishes (takatsuki) and jars, was also found. Surrounding the mound was a horseshoe-shaped moat. The mound is estimated to have been constructed during the mid-to-late {{ill|5th century|en|5th century|qid=Q8095|lt=5th century|1=5th century}} of the {{ill|Kofun period|en|Kofun period|qid=Q459939|lt=Kofun period|1=Kofun period}}. The recovered burial goods, including imitations of stone and iron tools, as well as unique items such as clogs, arrowheads, and offering dishes, provide critical insights into funerary rituals conducted at the mound's front section. The burial goods were Historic Site1 as an {{ill|Important Cultural Property (Japan)|en|Important Cultural Property (Japan)|qid=Q1188622|lt=Important Cultural Property|1=Important Cultural Property (Japan)}} in {{ill|1994|en|1994|qid=Q2067|lt=1994|1=1994}} (Heisei 6). == History == * {{ill|1938|en|1938|qid=Q18645|lt=1938|1=1938}} (Showa 13): Included in the "List of Kofun in Gunma Prefecture" under the name "Arato Village Tomb No. 9." * {{ill|1990|en|1990|qid=Q2064|lt=1990|1=1990}} (Heisei 2): Excavation conducted due to land development (Gunma Prefecture Board of Education, report published in {{ill|1991|en|1991|qid=Q2062|lt=1991|1=1991}}). * {{ill|1994|en|1994|qid=Q2067|lt=1994|1=1994}} (Heisei 6): burial goods Historic Site1 as {{ill|Important Cultural Property (Japan)|en|Important Cultural Property (Japan)|qid=Q1188622|lt=Important Cultural Property|1=Important Cultural Property (Japan)}} on June 28. == Mound area == The area of the mound are as follows: * Mound Length: 42 m * Rear Circular Section: ''' Diameter: 34 m * Front Section (Rectangular Protrusion): ''' Length: 8 m ''' Width: 13.8 m == designation1 == === Important designation1 (Nationally Designated) === * burial goods excavated from Butai No. 1 Kofun (archaeological materials). Details: {{hi11en begin |title = National Important designation1: "burial goods Excavated from Butai No. 1 Kofun" |border = #aaa solid 1px |titlestyle = text-align: center; background: lightgrey; }} * Stone products: ''' Magatama: 1 piece ''' Cylindrical beads: 202 pieces ''' Clogs: 1 pair ''' Arrowheads: 5 pieces (including fragments) ''' Axes: 9 pieces ''' Knives: 67 pieces (including fragments) ''' Sickles: 2 pieces (including fragments) ''' Perforated disks: 15 pieces (including fragments) * Iron products: ''' Axes (fragments): 2 pieces ''' Chisels (fragments): 3 pieces ''' Knives (fragments): 4 pieces ''' Sickles (fragments): 1 piece * Haji pottery: ''' Small jars: 2 pieces ''' Jars: 2 pieces ''' Offering dishes (with offerings): 13 pieces (including fragments) ''' Cover: 1 piece * Haniwa: ''' Morning glory-shaped: 4 pieces ''' Cylindrical: 58 pieces ''' (Supplementary) Haniwa fragments: collected {{hi11en end|qq=}} File:舞台1号墳出土 家形埴輪.JPG|House-shaped haniwa
{{small|Displayed at {{ill|Gunma Prefectural Museum of History|en|Gunma Prefectural Museum of History|qid=Q20982941|lt=Gunma Prefectural Museum of History|1=Gunma Prefectural Museum of History}}.|qq=}} File:舞台1号墳出土 円筒埴輪・朝顔形埴輪.JPG|Cylindrical and morning glory-shaped haniwa
{{small|Displayed at Gunma Prefectural Museum of History.|qq=}} File:舞台1号墳出土 石製品.JPG|Stone products
{{small|Displayed at Gunma Prefectural Museum of History.|qq=}} File:舞台1号墳出土 土師器高坏.JPG|Ritual offering Haji pottery takatsuki
{{small|Displayed at Gunma Prefectural Museum of History.|qq=}} == Related Facilities == * {{ill|Gunma Prefectural Museum of History|en|Gunma Prefectural Museum of History|qid=Q20982941|lt=Gunma Prefectural Museum of History|1=Gunma Prefectural Museum of History}} ({{ill|Takasaki|en|Takasaki|qid=Q336438|lt=Takasaki|1=Takasaki}}): Houses burial goods from Butai No. 1 Kofun. == notes == {{Reflist|qq=}} == References == {{small|(References used in writing the article)|qq=}} * {{Cite book|editor=|author=Noriyuki Furuya|year=2002|chapter=Butai No. 1 Kofun|title=[[Japanese Kofun Encyclopedia|続 日本古墳大辞典]]|publisher=[[Tokyo-do Publishing]]|isbn=4490105991|ref={{Harvid|Butai No. 1 Kofun|2002|qq=}}|qq=}} == External Links == * {{National Historic Site Database|201|10106|burial goods excavated from Butai No. 1 Kofun|qq=}} {{Kofun navbar|qq=}} {{translated page|ja|舞台1号墳|version=99995576|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ja:舞台1号墳]] {{wikidata link|Q109369265}} [[Category:Important Cultural Property of Japan in Gunma prefecture]] [[Category:Kofun of Gunma prefecture]] [[Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] [[Category:Scallop Kofun]] [[Category:Wikidata no short description]] [[Category:History of Maebashi]] [[Category:Kofun of Gunma prefecture]] [[Category:群馬県の重要文化財]]
